sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see both panels clearly. Let me compare:
Bottom-left panel (source):
- Row 1: RRRRRR bbbbbb bbbbbb = red, blue, blue
- Row 2: RRRRRR center RRRRRR = red, center, red
- Row 3: bbbbbb bbbbbb RRRRRR = blue, blue, red
Bottom-right panel (target, current):
- Row 1: RRRRRR bbbbbb bbbbbb = red, blue, blue ✓
- Row 2: RRRRRR center bbbbbb = red, center, blue ✗ (should be red)
- Row 3: bbbbbb bbbbbb RRRRRR = blue, blue, red ✓
So the middle-right cell (1,2) needs to be changed from blue to red. That's at rows 44-49, cols 52-57, center at row 46, col 54.
Wait, but looking at the bottom-left panel row 2: RRRRRR center RRRRRR = red, center, red
And the bottom-right panel row 2: RRRRRR center bbbbbb = red, center, blue
So I need to click on cell (1,2) of the bottom-right panel to turn it red.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare bottom-left and bottom-right panels
# Bottom-left: R,b,b / R,center,R / b,b,R
# Bottom-right: R,b,b / R,center,b / b,b,R
# Need to change cell (1,2) from blue to red

# Cell (1,2) in bottom-right: rows 44-49, cols 52-57, center at 46, 54
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 54}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
